name: Declaratory Judgment for Retirement Plan Qualification

eligibility.description: Available to employers, plan administrators, or interested employees who have exhausted administrative remedies and have put the plan or amendment into effect.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows employers or plan administrators to seek a Tax Court ruling on the initial or continuing tax-qualified status of a retirement plan if the IRS fails to act or issues an adverse determination.
